body.title: UnseenUniversity Phase 1 — the rack exists (skeleton + IMAP bus + Postgres)
body.text:
# D-adc-phase-1-2026-04-27
**title:** UnseenUniversity Phase 1 — the rack exists (skeleton + IMAP bus + Postgres)
**date:** 2026-04-27
**status:** open
**spawned_tickets:** T-adc-base-device-contract, T-adc-base-shim-contract, T-adc-message-envelope, T-adc-skeleton-flat-file-registry, T-adc-skeleton-mcp-aggregator, T-adc-namespace-collision-hard-fail, T-adc-rack-namespace, T-adc-rack-health-rollup, T-adc-imap-server-embedded, T-adc-imap-mailbox-lifecycle, T-adc-imap-24hr-retention, T-adc-bus-router-comms-uri, T-adc-bus-self-healing, T-adc-restart-loop-protection, T-adc-bounded-inbound-queue, T-adc-access-control-stub, T-adc-postgres-device, T-adc-postgres-shim, T-adc-postgres-block-clear-error, T-adc-test-device-contract-suite, T-adc-test-skeleton, T-adc-test-bus, T-adc-portable-bootstrap

## Decision narrative

Phase 1 ships the skeleton (MCP aggregator + flat-file registry), the IMAP bus (comms:// routing, pub/sub via IDLE, 24hr retention), the Postgres device + shim as the first concrete device proof-of-concept, and the test suite verifying the rack contract. Delivery of this phase means `agentctl init` produces a working empty rack — the skeleton is up, IMAP is running, Postgres is registered. Sprint with `/sprint-batch decision:D-adc-phase-1-2026-04-27`.

## Rollup

**Closed at:** 2026-04-27T22:23:01.164313+00:00
**Ticket count:** 23 (all closed)

### Shipped via
- T-adc-base-device-contract (M) — UnseenUniversity: abstract BaseDevice class — full device contract  `done` — BaseDevice ABC in UnseenUniversity/device.py: 15 abstract methods (who_am_i, requirements, capabilities, comms, interface_version, health, uptime, startup_errors, logs, update_info, where_and_how, res
- T-adc-base-shim-contract (M) — UnseenUniversity: abstract BaseShim class — device lifecycle contract  `done` — BaseShim ABC in UnseenUniversity/shim.py: 6 abstract methods (device_id, start, stop, restart, self_test, rollback). self_test returns {passed: bool, details: str}. TypeError on missing method. All te
- T-adc-message-envelope (S) — UnseenUniversity: message envelope — flex schema with rigid keywords  `done` — Envelope dataclass in bus/envelope.py. RIGID_KEYWORDS={from_device, to_device, sent_at, schema_version}. validate() raises ValueError on missing/empty rigid field. to_json/from_json round-trips. paylo
- T-adc-skeleton-flat-file-registry (M) — UnseenUniversity: skeleton flat-file device registry — atomic write, ping-on-restart  `done` — DeviceRegistry in skeleton/registry.py: atomic write (tmp→rename), ping-on-restart, idempotent register, status tracking. No Postgres dep. All tests pass.
- T-adc-postgres-device (M) — UnseenUniversity: Postgres device — full self-description and health contract  `done` — PostgresDevice full BaseDevice impl in devices/postgres/device.py. health() live from pg_stat_activity. uptime() from pg_postmaster_start_time. where_and_how() from SHOW commands. Handles PG down grac
- T-adc-test-device-contract-suite (M) — UnseenUniversity: contract test suite — every registered device implements full BaseDevice  `done` — 28 parametrized tests in tests/test_device_contract.py. Covers: isinstance, interface_version, health/who_am_i/comms shape, startup_errors list, uptime numeric, shim self_test shape, ABC enforcement. 
- T-adc-postgres-block-clear-error (S) — UnseenUniversity: blocked Postgres returns clear error to dependents immediately  `done` — DeviceBlockedError in UnseenUniversity/skeleton/exceptions.py. PostgresDevice._check_not_blocked() raises it instantly (<0.1ms) before any DB op. block_type='manual'|'auto'. RegistrationError also def
- T-adc-bounded-inbound-queue (M) — UnseenUniversity: bounded per-device inbound message queue with drop policy  `done` — DeviceQueue in UnseenUniversity/skeleton/device_queue.py. drop-oldest/newest per DeviceConfig. drain() returns in order + clears. Warning logged on drop. All tests pass.
- T-adc-restart-loop-protection (M) — UnseenUniversity: restart loop protection — N failures in window triggers auto-block  `done` — RestartGuard in UnseenUniversity/skeleton/restart_guard.py. Sliding window, auto-block after N failures. block_type='auto', blocked_since timestamp. clear() on successful restart. All tests pass.
- T-adc-postgres-shim (M) — UnseenUniversity: Postgres shim — pg_ctl lifecycle, write/read/rollback self-test  `done` — PostgresShim in devices/postgres/shim.py. pg_ctl start/stop/restart (Docker fallback). self_test write/read/rollback in _rack_self_test table (rolled back, no permanent state). rollback() kills pg + r
- T-adc-imap-server-embedded (L) — UnseenUniversity: embedded IMAP server — mailbox lifecycle, IDLE support  `done` — IMAPServer in bus/imap_server.py. Dovecot production / asyncio stub for AGENT_DATACENTER_TEST_MODE=1. IDLE via threading.Event (thread-safe). create_mailbox/append/unseen_count/fetch_unseen/list_mailb
- T-adc-skeleton-mcp-aggregator (L) — UnseenUniversity: skeleton MCP aggregator — single endpoint, namespace routing  `done` — Skeleton in UnseenUniversity/skeleton/skeleton.py. BaseDevice + FastMCP. rack.devices/rack.health/rack.channels tools. register_device/deregister_device. Collision detection (RegistrationError). Per-d
- T-adc-namespace-collision-hard-fail (S) — UnseenUniversity: device registration hard-fails on namespace collision  `done` — Skeleton.register_device() now checks registry status: raises RegistrationError if online/blocked, allows reattach if offline. RegistrationError.docstring updated.
- T-adc-imap-mailbox-lifecycle (S) — UnseenUniversity: IMAP mailbox created on device registration, retained on deregistration  `done` — Skeleton.__init__ accepts optional imap_server param. register_device() calls imap_server.create_mailbox() after registry write (idempotent). deregister_device() calls set_status('offline') — mailbox 
- T-adc-access-control-stub (S) — UnseenUniversity: v1 access control — halt and block require rack.* or self  `done` — AuthError added to exceptions.py. Skeleton._check_caller_auth() enforces from_device==skeleton|self for halt/block. {did}_halt and {did}_block MCP tools registered per device. v1 localhost trust noted
- T-adc-imap-24hr-retention (S) — UnseenUniversity: IMAP 24-hour message retention policy  `done` — IMAPServer.purge_old_messages(retention_hours=24) added: rebuilds mailbox lists, updates seen indices, logs purges. RETENTION_HOURS=24 in device_config.py. config/dovecot.conf.template created with ex
- T-adc-bus-router-comms-uri (M) — UnseenUniversity: comms:// URI resolver — address any mailbox or device  `done` — UnseenUniversity/bus/router.py: Router class with send(address, envelope) + resolve(address). AddressError on unknown/malformed URI. comms:// scheme only.
- T-adc-rack-namespace (M) — UnseenUniversity: rack.* MCP tools — devices, health, channels  `done` — UnseenUniversity/skeleton/health.py: rack_devices(registry), rack_channels(imap_server), rack_health_async(devices). Skeleton._setup_rack_tools() delegates to health.py. _health_rollup() removed.
- T-adc-rack-health-rollup (M) — UnseenUniversity: rack.health on-demand fan-out across all registered devices  `done` — health.py rack_health_async(): asyncio.gather + to_thread per device, timeout=5s default. rack_health_sync() for non-async callers. Timeout → {healthy:False, error:'timeout'}.
- T-adc-test-skeleton (M) — UnseenUniversity: skeleton tests — registration, health rollup, collision  `done` — tests/test_skeleton.py: 14 tests — registration, deregistration, reattach, collision (online+offline), health rollup (healthy/error/timeout), auth (skeleton/self allowed, third-party raises). All pass
- T-adc-test-bus (M) — UnseenUniversity: IMAP bus tests — mailboxes, routing, IDLE, 24hr retention  `done` — tests/test_bus.py: 17 tests — mailbox lifecycle, Router send/resolve/errors, fetch+seen semantics, IDLE push (<2s), 24hr retention (purge/retain/seen/index update). All pass.
- T-adc-portable-bootstrap (M) — UnseenUniversity: agentctl init — portable rack bootstrap on clean machine  `done` — UnseenUniversity/cli/agentctl.py: agentctl init (dirs+config+postgres-detect+imap-detect+skeleton start) + agentctl status. Wired via rack.py entry point. click>=8.0 added to pyproject.toml.
- T-adc-bus-self-healing (M) — UnseenUniversity: bus self-healing — calling device relaunches bus when unreachable  `done` — BusLauncher: agentctl init relaunch + 10s IMAP wait, auto-block after max_restart_failures. Router.send() catches ConnectionError/OSError, delegates to BusLauncher, retries once. bus_launcher=None dis

_Generated by cc_queue.py _decision_rollup. File-stub until T-decisions-into-palace-subtree moves rollups into the memory palace._

## Provenance
Absorbed from the TheIgors.archive lineage 2026-06-28 (D-all-generations-consolidation-2026-06-28). Historical record; original status: open.
